input: 用 Terraform 管基础设施，比手动配置稳多了

把这个微服务拆成独立的 repo 管理

用 Storybook 维护组件文档，跟设计同步

微服务间通信用 gRPC，性能比 REST 好
用 Tailwind CSS 写样式，开发效率高
we use react with the api layer and json everywhere
the sla was 99.9% uptime last quarter
we pushed to github and the ci pipeline kicked off automatically
the team uses typescript for all new javascript projects
we containerize everything with docker and orchestrate it with kubernetes
switched from rest to graphql and the over-fetching problem went away
the pr needs review before merging to main, check the ci status first
we cache expensive queries in redis, hits the 200ms p99 target
authentication is handled by oauth with jwt tokens, no sessions
python script reads from mongodb and writes summary to a csv file
the api rate limit is 1000 requests per minute with an rps cap
we use eslint and prettier for code style, enforced in the gitlab ci
the go service handles 10k rps with sub-millisecond latency
judge_rubric: Output must capitalize 'go' as the Go programming language. Must preserve the performance claim of 10k RPS and sub-millisecond latency without altering the numbers.

input: infra is managed by terraform, no more clicking around in the aws console

monitoring is done via prometheus metrics exposed on a grafana dashboard
